title: DUNN HOUSE SHELTER - 211info
text: DUNN HOUSE SHELTER DUNN HOUSE SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an emergency shelter (up to 30 days) for survivors of domestic violence, sexual assault, sex trafficking, and their children. Offers weekly education and support groups related to both trauma recovery and parenting, during which advocates and volunteers provide childcare. Clothing, food, hygiene items, and limited transportation are available to residents. Eligibility: Any individual experiencing domestic violence, sexual assault, sex trafficking or stalking Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 779-4357 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 779-4357 Helpline (855) 216-2111 Toll-free Helpline Helpline (541) 779-4357 Español (541) 779-2393 ext 209 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: This is a safe shelter and location information is kept confidential. Services: Domestic Violence Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
